introSection: Cobralino is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Conny-Land in Lipperswil, Thurgau, Switzerland. The ride opened on 8 April 2017.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The ride has a single one-person car train modeled as a soap car.

fullText:
Cobralino is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Conny-Land in Lipperswil, Thurgau, Switzerland. The ride opened on 8 April 2017.

The ride has a single one-person car train modeled as a soap car.
